summary: FPV drones struck a Ukrainian BUK air defense system near Bolshoy Sokolny Island, and a Russian Ka-52 helicopter was downed near Nadiivka, Donetsk region, with its crew eliminated after a crash landing and during an evacuation attempt. Ukrainian FPV pilots are experimenting with tactics such as disorienting Russian forces before strikes, and in one case, a Russian infantryman was killed in a failed bayonet charge against a drone. A Russian soldier was hit by two Ukrainian FPV drones simultaneously while hiding behind a tree. Separately, an Iranian-backed militia used a fiber-optic FPV drone to attack the US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport. Ukrainian forces were awarded the Order of Courage, 2nd class, for downing the Russian Ka-52 with an FPV drone.
